review_title: AI writer that can produce 750 words long, readable articles
description: I am using AF for SEO campaigns. For example, RankerX and SEO Autopilot campaigns. AF allows me to create several articles with few clicks. By producing more articles, my SEO campaigns have more unique, less spun content.
author: Klemen V.
pros: Version 3.0 is big improvement over 2.6. I was hesitant as articles produces with v2.6 lacked something. They just did not feel right and I had to correct them with Jarvis. However, v3.0 is a big improvement. I can use 750 words long articles for SEO purposes. Article Forge articles may pass manual moderation and therefore tend to "stick". That is critical. For SEO purposes I cannot afford to manually create articles using tools like Jarvis. Single click production really helps me. If AF articles are spun with WordAi, they get even better and no longer test positive for GPL-2.
cons: Fact checking. AI does not distinguish between rum and tequila. While majority of articles are OK, you need to spend 10 seconds on each article.That is still much better than spending 15 minutes on each article.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best Article AI Creator ive used
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: So simple interface put in your keyword, length of article needed, do you want an image, boom, done
cons: bit pricey if you need to create a lot of articles if you are a agency for instance
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I had greater expectations from Article Forge, but I am not convinced by the content overall. Hence, switched over to other product.
author: Madhu K.
pros: Ease of operation. Generates content in few seconds. Good customer support.
cons: Content output quality is weak, needs far improvement. Limited words output generation. Repetition of the words and statements are more in the paragraphs. Below are the observations that I had sent to the business: "These are my observations from the Free Trial: The article content gets repetitive in a few places. Not convincing content at an appreciable level to the main article topic/main keyword. There are more chances of readers getting confused as the flow of the content gets broken and adding the content at other places within the article. Strange Example: Facebook doesn't allow affiliate links, but Article Forge content says " can be posted"! Referral links are fine. Even though the content generated makes feel like by a human written, but the article content output generated is not satisfactory form. The deletion and addition of the contents within the article if done, will likely disturb the readers and will not sync with reading momentum. I had greater expectations from Article Forge, but I am not convinced by the content overall"
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Saif A.
pros: Most like part of using articleforge is that it provides very relevant generated contents
cons: Sometime it generate same contents for some part

review_title: An interesting ay to create content
description: I liked it starting writing SEO content because it reduced the work time and the texts were good, however for the price I had higher expectations.
author: Mariana U.
pros: It is quite intuitive to use, it is recommended for beginners in writing SEO articles. The texts are unique because duplicate content is controlled and sentences flow coherently, thus reducing work time.
cons: It's pretty good to start with and I had a good experience, but the price is a bit expensive for Latin American people compared to other apps with similar functions.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Decent article generator for tier 2 links but not human readable
description: The overall experience is ok. We are still looking for something that can give us human readable articles that can also pass Google but we haven't been very lucky yet. Have tried many so far
author: Amna R.
pros: This is very easy to use. Just give it a topic, enter some keywords and voila, you will have an article to use! You can even automate it to Wordpress.
cons: The articles are NOT human readable. You cannot use them on your main sites. They are only good enough for guest post for tier 2 (backlink) websites

review_title: Good for Tier 1/2 Backlinks. Not for Main Site
description: Overall experience has been ok. I was hoping for a better writing product but our search is still ongoing.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Its very easy to use. Just enter a title, some keywords and voila, you will have a unique article that you can use. You can also integrate it with WordAI for spinning/grammar etc
cons: Its still not human readable. You can't use it on your main money site or on good Tier 1 backlinks (high profile websites). You can use it for lower class tier 1 backlinks or tier 2 backlinks.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
